{{Infobox character
| name = Torrence
| introduced = [[Of Kings and Killers (novel)|Of Kings and Killers]]
}}

== Of Kings and Killers ==
{{spoiler|book=ee-sea-03-of-kings-and-killers|[[Torrence]] is the son of [[Baldezar Kern]] and collects rocking-horses.}}

[[Category:Characters]]
[[Category:Of Kings and Killers]]
